name: Baby Care
description: Professional babysitting service for children. Our trained caregivers ensure safety, playtime, and proper attention.

name: Elderly Care
description: Compassionate care for elderly people including daily assistance, companionship, and medication reminders.

name: Sick People Care
description: Home care service for sick patients including monitoring health, medicine support, and basic nursing assistance.

name: Special Needs Care
description: Expert caregivers trained to assist individuals with special needs, providing personalized support and safety.

name: Night Care Service
description: Reliable overnight caregiving for children, elderly, or patients to ensure safety and peace of mind.

name: Postpartum Care
description: Professional care for mothers and newborns after delivery. Includes feeding support, health monitoring, and rest facilitation.
